hero.slide_1_title: Grounded in Sustainability for a Better Planet
hero.slide_1_subtitle: Integrating environmental care & community well-being into sustainable industrial operations & business practices compliant with UN SDGs.
hero.slide_2_title: Fueling Innovation Through an Advanced R&D Ecosystem
hero.slide_2_subtitle: Advanced research, continuous improvement, and a commitment to breakthroughs in scalable, high-performance solutions.
hero.slide_3_title: Glycine and Glycolic Acid Manufacturer in India
hero.slide_3_subtitle: Serving pharmaceutical, personal care, food, and industrial markets with export-ready supply and technical support.

aviga.subtitle: Glycolic Acid
aviga.description: The AviGa™ Series (Glycolic Acid): Our premier Glycolic Acid platform, offering grades from high purity Cosmetic (CP) to robust Technical (T) specifications, engineered for superior performance.

avigly.subtitle: Glycine USP
avigly.description: The AviGly™ Series (Glycine): Our flagship line of Glycine, available in high purity pharmaceutical (USP) and versatile technical grades to meet the most stringent industry demands.

avivan.subtitle: Taurine
avivan.description: AviVan™ (Vanillin): A leading choice for the food and fragrance industries, delivering exceptional sensory profiles backed by our manufacturing excellence.

title: Where It
Began
began.description: From a single production line to 4,200 MT annual capacity across glycine, glycolic acid, and taurine. Since 2007, we have supported regulated industries with manufacturing and supply continuity.

title: How We
Operate
operate.description: 18,000 sq. m. zero-discharge facility in Vadodara. 150+ professionals across manufacturing, R&D, and quality. Regional commercial support in the US and Europe backs customer qualification and supply planning.

title: What’s
Next
next.description: With 100% renewable electricity now achieved and a net-zero carbon target for 2050, we continue to advance responsible manufacturing while expanding our global capabilities.

global_presence.title: Global Presence
global_presence.subTitle: Manufacturing headquarters in Vadodara, India. Regional sales support through Avid Organics America Inc. and our Maastricht, Netherlands office.
